description: CompositionDusty pink strappy dress made of 100% silk with 100% polyester lining in the same colour, with ruffled bib, thin adjustable shoulder straps, concealed zipper on the left side and with tie back waistFittingRegularWash care Cold hand wash separately with delicate detergent Wash garment inside out Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Drip dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Professionally dry cleanable Indulge the girly side in you with this dusty pink dress from  forever new. The ruffled bib and the tie back sash infuses this dress with delicate femininity. Team this with silver ballerina flats and a soft white cardigan and a string of pearls for a really fresh look.Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
